title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 25.5%.

items.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: It would be a weird combo of some of the most anti-Corbyn Labour members and the people who did not vote for Corbyn in 2015 but did in 2016, is my hunch from having covered past Labour leadership elections.
